title: Scrub PII Before the API Call
description: Remove personal data from text before sending to a third-party LLM.
problem: Write scrub_pii(text) that replaces email addresses with [EMAIL] and order numbers (format #12345) with [ORDER]. Everything else stays intact.
starter_code:
import re

def scrub_pii(text):
    # Replace emails with [EMAIL]
    # Replace order numbers like #12345 with [ORDER]
    return text  # fix this
hint: Use re.sub(). Email: r'[\w.-]+@[\w.-]+\.[a-z]{2,}'. Order: r'#\d+'

test_cases.label: Scrubs both
test_cases.call: scrub_pii('I am jane@example.com and order #99001 is wrong')
test_cases.expected: I am [EMAIL] and order [ORDER] is wrong

test_cases.label: Clean text unchanged
test_cases.call: scrub_pii('I need help with my subscription')
test_cases.expected: I need help with my subscription
